items.summary: Restore the wine entries previously inserted by the user that were lost. Re-populate the backend with the wines that were added before the data loss, ensuring they appear in the wine list on load. If the exact wine entries are not recoverable from context, seed the backend with the known sample wines (Croatia and Italy, at least 3 per country) as a baseline and ensure stable storage is in place so data persists across canister upgrades.

Remove the Naturavini logo from the PDF export in frontend/src/components/WineTable.tsx. The exported PDF must not include any logo image at the top or anywhere else in the document. The rest of the PDF content (wine catalogue grouped by country, all columns) must remain intact.
